lines.speaker: Master Farmer
lines.text: Cor blimey mate, what are ye doing in me pockets?

sections.title: Talking to Master Farmers in Varlamore

lines.speaker: Master Farmer
lines.text: Well, the work is going well, so I'm very good, thank you.

lines.speaker: Master Farmer
lines.text: Nilsal! I'm pretty good, thank you. It's always nice to be out in the sun.

lines.speaker: Master Farmer
lines.text: Hello there! Nice weather we've been having. Perfect for a day outdoors!
